title: felicia reevesii
intro: Felicia reevesii, also known as Blue Felicia or Cape Blue Daisy, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Felicia reevesii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Felicia reevesii can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, infusions, and topical creams.
